name: Roasted Red Bell Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound red bell pepper (Solero's roasted, canned peppers)
recipeInstructions: Heat olive oil in a stockpot. Add the roasted red bell pepper, garlic, and onion; cook until the onion is translucent. Stir in the bay leaf, Creole seasoning, cumin, salt, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce. Gradually add water and bring to a boil. Blend the soup smooth using a blender or food processor. Stir in the whipping cream and blend again (you may need to do this in batches). Divide the soup among 4 to 6 bowls and garnish with corn kernels and tortilla strips. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
